actions.name: Generate shallow Linux kernel bundles
actions.description: Generates and uploads shallow Linux kernel bundles to GitHub Container Registry using ORAS. Prepares git trees and caches work to optimize subsequent runs, while also managing disk space on the runner. Performs both bulk processing and individual uploads for kernel versions.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 1:00

actions.name: Watchdog
actions.description: Monitors and reruns failed jobs for specified GitHub Actions workflows. It checks the latest run status of the workflow and triggers a rerun if the previous attempt failed and the maximum retry limit has not been reached. This ensures that transient issues do not cause permanent failures in the CI/CD pipeline.
